title: Steamed Jamaican Coriander Delight
description: An indulgent and crisp Jamaican dish featuring the flavors of coriander seeds, steamed to perfection in a bamboo steamer. Whole30-friendly and a delicious twist on traditional Jamaican cuisine.

ingredients.name: scotch bonnet peppers
ingredients.notes: seeded and chopped for reduced heat

ingredients.name: grass-fed chicken breast
ingredients.notes: boneless and skinless for easy cooking

instructions: Prepare the bamboo steamer by greasing it with coconut oil.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the steamer basket.
Place the grass-fed chicken breast in the steamer basket with the onion and garlic.
Add the freshly toasted coriander seeds, chopped scotch bonnet peppers, chopped fresh thyme, and chopped fresh mint to the steamer basket.
Pour in the freshly squeezed lemon juice and sprinkle with salt.
Place the steamer basket over boiling water and cover with a lid.
Steam for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
